examples: All told there were 104 people on the payroll.
Before Harrington knew it, she was down to her last $20,000, not enough to cover payroll.
I thought graduate teaching assistants will automatically put on the payroll at the beginning of the semester.
Revolvers also come in handy with other short-term expenses, such as payroll and utilities.
All too often, struggling small businesses fall behind in paying their federal payroll taxes.
